blocked_examples.reason: Browserbase could not resolve the DOI landing page in this run, so there is no page or candidate PDF screenshot evidence to approve a derived pdf_url label.

Browserbase evidence did not verify the Taylor candidate PDF route: DOI resolution landed outside Taylor, rendered links did not ground the candidate, and the direct Taylor candidate did not return approval-quality HTTP 200 evidence.

diagnosis: Taylor pdf_url Browserbase scale batch produced approval-quality evidence for 48/50 candidates. Approved rows reached the candidate Taylor /doi/pdf route with HTTP 200, retained a /doi/pdf final URL, and had screenshot evidence. Two rows were blocked: one DOI.org navigation failure and one weak render/wrong-publisher PDF signal.
recommendation: Continue Taylor pdf_url Goldie-backfilled grounding in another 50-row batch if capacity is available. Keep derived labels separate from current-Goldie KPI and do not mutate merged-FINAL.csv.

tests_run.command: Browserbase Taylor pdf_url scale batch, skip 10 limit 50 concurrency 4

tests_run.result: 48/50 approved; approved rows retain /doi/pdf final URLs with HTTP 200 and screenshots; 2 blocked for missing approval-quality evidence
approved rows written only to a derived ledger; merged-FINAL.csv unchanged; current-Goldie KPI effect is none
